scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 100 Trying [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number]pid1001 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Supported: timer,100rel Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number]pid1001 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Allow: INVITE,ACK,OPTIONS,BYE,CANCEL,INFO,REFER,NOTIFY,PRACK,UPDATE Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length:[len]
v=0 o=- 1402607477 2 IN IP[media_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [local_ip] b=AS:1024 t=0 0 a=activetalker:1 a=videostream:1 m=audio 16394 RTP/SAVP 0 101 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=ptime:20 a=acfg:1 t=1 a=1 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:mJO7TJ48qVkjwjUoAj6kVOft8zYq+dHT0hRf4zHI UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP m=video 12036 RTP/AVP 99 b=TIAS:1024000 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:99 H264/90000 a=fmtp:99 profile-level-id=64001e;packetization-mode=1;max-mbps=49100;max-dpb=3645 a=content:main a=label:1 a=rtcp-fb:* nack pli a=rtcp-fb:* ccm fir m=application 12318 RTP/AVP 100 a=inactive a=rtpmap:100 H224/4800 m=application 4000 TCP/BFCP * c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [local_ip] a=floorctrl:c-only a=setup:active a=connection:new

SIP/2.0 100 Trying [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number]pid1001 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Supported: timer,100rel Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0
